task: Find parking near the San Francisco Museum of Modern Art for next Sunday from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. I'm driving a Ford F-150 and need a garage that allows in-and-out privileges. If there are multiple options, show me the details of the one with the lowest price.
action_history: Type "San Francisco Museum of Modern Art"
thoughts: I can see the SpotHero homepage. Let me click on the search field and type the location.
I can see the SpotHero homepage. Let me click on the search field and type the location.
I can see the autocomplete suggestions now. The first option under "Places" is "San Francisco Museum Of Modern Art, 3rd Street, San Fra...". Let me click on it.

The location is set. Now I need to adjust the date and time. The current settings show "Today, 9:30 PM" to "Mar 04, 12:30 AM". I need to change to next Sunday (March 8) from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Let me click on the date/time picker.

I can see the date/time picker. I need to change:
- Start Time: Mar 3, 2026 → Mar 8, 2026 (next Sunday) and 9:30 PM → 1:00 PM
- End Time: Mar 4, 2026 → Mar 8, 2026 and 12:30 AM → 5:00 PM

Let me first click on the Start Time date field to change it.
I can see the calendar for March 2026. I need to click on March 8 (next Sunday). I can see "8" in the calendar on the Sunday column.
The date is now set to Mar 8, 2026 for both start and end. Now I need to change the start time from 9:30 PM to 1:00 PM. Let me click on the start time field.
A select picker has opened with time options. I need to select "1:00 PM" which is at index 26.
Start time is now set to Mar 08, 1:00 PM. Now I need to change the end time from 10:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Let me click on the end time field.
I can see the end time select picker has opened. I need to select "5:00 PM" which is at index 7.

All the search parameters are now correctly set:
- Location: San Francisco Museum of Modern Art, 3rd Street, ...
- Start time: Mar 08, 1:00 PM
- End time: Mar 08, 5:00 PM

Now let me click the "Search" button to find parking spots.

The search results are now loaded. I can see parking options near SFMOMA for March 8, 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Before looking at specific results, I need to:

1. Set the vehicle type to Ford F-150 (since it's a large truck)
2. Filter for garages with in-and-out privileges

Let me first set the vehicle type. I'll click on "Vehicle Type".
An "Add Vehicle" dialog has appeared. I need to type "Ford F-150" in the search field. Let me click on the search field and type.
An "Add Vehicle" dialog has appeared. I need to type "Ford F-150" in the search field. Let me click on the search field and type.
I can see the autocomplete suggestions showing "Ford F-150" at the top. Let me click on it.
"Ford F-150" is now selected in the search field. Let me click "Add Vehicle" to apply this filter.

The Ford F-150 filter has been applied (I can see "Ford F-150 ×" in the filter bar). Now I need to filter for garages with in-and-out privileges. Let me click on the "Filters" button to see more filter options.

I can see the Filters panel. I need to select both "In & Out Allowed (5)" and "Garage - Covered" since the user wants a garage with in-and-out privileges. Let me first check "In & Out Allowed" and also "Garage - Covered".
I've checked "In & Out Allowed" and the filter shows 5 results. Now I also need to check "Garage - Covered" since the user specifically wants a garage. Let me check that filter too.
Both "Garage - Covered" and "In & Out Allowed" are now checked (showing 5 results). Now let me click "Show 5 Results" to apply these filters.

Now I can see the filtered results with 5 garages that have in-and-out privileges and are covered garages, filtered for Ford F-150. I need to find the one with the lowest price. Let me sort by price to find the cheapest option. Let me first scroll down to see all results and their prices.

The visible results so far:
1. 147 Minna St. – SFMOMA Garage: $16.49 Total

Let me scroll down to see the remaining result and the full price of option 4.

Now I can see all 5 results. Let me summarize the prices:

1. 147 Minna St. – SFMOMA Garage: $16.49 Total
2. 300 3rd St. (350 3rd St.) – Museum ...: $21.20 Total
3. Unlimited In/Out Access – 155 Stev...: $42.40 Total
4. 567 Folsom St. (303 2nd St) – Gar...: $14.74+ Total

The lowest price is **$9.99** at "1 Rizal St. (360 3rd St.) – Garage". Let me click on "Details" to see more information about this option.

I can see the details panel for the cheapest option. Let me scroll down within the details panel to see more information about this garage.

The details so far show:
- **1 Rizal St. (360 3rd St.) – Garage**
- Rating: 4.7 (612 reviews)
- 9 minute walk (0.4 mi)
- Price: $9.99 Total
- Reservation: Mar 8, 1:00 PM – 7:00 PM (6 hours)

- "Your reservation was extended at no extra charge!"

Let me scroll down to see more details like amenities and other information.

I can see important details now. Under "Things You Should Know" it says:
- Height restriction: 6' 4"
- Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large...

This is critical - it says "Standard sized vehicles only" and there's a height restriction of 6'4". A Ford F-150 is a full-size pickup truck that typically stands around 6'3" to 6'8" tall and would likely not fit. Let me scroll down to read the full vehicle restriction.

I can now see the full details. Importantly, under "Things You Should Know," it states: "Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, **pickup trucks**, and passenger vans."

Since the Ford F-150 is a pickup truck, this $9.99 option at 1 Rizal St. would NOT work. Let me go back and check the next cheapest option. Let me close this details panel and look at the next one.

The next cheapest options would be:
- 567 Folsom St. (303 2nd St) – Gar...: $14.74+ Total
- 147 Minna St. – SFMOMA Garage: $16.49 Total

Let me click on the Details for 567 Folsom St. first.
Good, the details panel is closed. Now let me click on the "Details" link for 567 Folsom St. to check its details.

Interesting! I can see that 567 Folsom St. has two pricing options:
- **Standard**: $14.74 (4 hours, no in-and-out)
- **In & Out**: $42.40 (selected)

So for in-and-out privileges, this garage costs $42.40, not $14.74. Let me scroll down to see more details and check vehicle restrictions.
So the In & Out option at 567 Folsom is $42.40 for 24 hours. Now let me check the other garages' in-and-out pricing. Let me close this and check 147 Minna St. ($16.49).
Good, the panel is closed. I need to scroll up to see the first option (147 Minna St.) and click its Details.
Now I can see all the results. Let me click "Details" on the first option - 147 Minna St. – SFMOMA Garage at $16.49.

Excellent! I can see the details for 147 Minna St. – SFMOMA Garage:
- **Price: $16.49 Total**
- **Reservation: Mar 8, 1:00 PM – 5:00 PM** (4 hours)
- **In & Out Allowed** ✓
- Rating: 4.6 (4.2k reviews)
- 3 minute walk (0.2 mi)
- Labeled "Shortest Walk"

This is a single price (no "+"), meaning $16.49 already includes in-and-out privileges. Let me scroll down to check for any vehicle restrictions.

I can see more details. The height restriction is 6'9" which should accommodate a Ford F-150 (typically around 6'3"-6'6" tall). It also mentions the garage is open 7am-11pm on weekends, so the 1-5 PM Sunday window is fine. Let me scroll down to check for any vehicle size restrictions.

This garage ALSO says "Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, **pickup trucks**, and passenger vans." So it can't accommodate a Ford F-150 either!

Let me check the next option - 300 3rd St. at $21.20. Let me close this and click its Details.
Good, panel is closed. Now let me click on "Details" for the 300 3rd St. option at $21.20.

I can see the details for 300 3rd St. (350 3rd St.) – Museum Parc Garage:
- Rating: 4.8 (1.9k reviews)
- 5 minute walk (0.2 mi)
- Price: $21.20 Total
- Reservation: Mar 8, 1:00 PM – 7:00 PM (6 hours)
- **In & Out Allowed** ✓
- "Your reservation was extended at no extra charge!"

Let me scroll down to check vehicle restrictions.

I can see the "Things You Should Know" section for 300 3rd St. – Museum Parc Garage. So far I see:
- After regular hours instructions
- May become valet depending on occupancy
- Chevrolet Bolt vehicles not allowed (safety recall)
- Height restriction: 6' 5"

I notice the height restriction is 6'5" - that's very tight for a Ford F-150. But let me scroll down to see if there's an explicit restriction on pickup trucks like the other garages had.

This is the key finding. The 300 3rd St. – Museum Parc Garage does NOT have a restriction against pickup trucks (unlike the first two cheaper options). It only mentions:
- Height restriction: 6' 5"
- Chevrolet Bolt restriction (safety recall)

The amenities include: Self Park, Garage - Covered, Touchless, In & Out Allowed, Wheelchair Accessible.

This appears to be the lowest-priced option that can accommodate a Ford F-150 with in-and-out privileges at **$21.20 Total**. Let me save this as my answer and scroll down to see if there are access hours details.
